series_metadata.series_title: Fire Charter applications and related materials
series_metadata.series_description: In accordance with ORC 4765.55 the Executive Director Division of EMS issues a certificate of accreditation to institutions who meet the criteria outlined in the O.A.C. to providing training for individuals seeking firefighter and fire safety inspector certification. These applications include documentation of the how the courses will be conducted. A Charter is valid for a period of three years. Limited information from application (institution name, address, telephone number, fax number, contact person, as well as charter expiration date when issued, is maintained in an electronic data base.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Applications are maintained for one charter cycle (3 years) or until renewed, then destroy. Copies of correspondence pertaining to charter and copies of charter certificates issued are maintained for three charter cycles or until program is no longer chartered, then destroy. ; Electronic: Permanent or until program charter status is no longer active., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
